what_was_done: Built memory layer (LanceDB+HF embeddings), ported all 17 gates, created AGENTS.md, added promptGuidelines to tools, added auto-RAG via before_provider_request, updated pi-agent to v0.57.0.
known_issues: Trading bot: backtest journal doesn't call close_trade() so win_rate returns 0
Pi-agent /reload does NOT pick up code changes to extensions — must restart pi-agent after rebuild
Pi-agent edit tool inherently requires read-first (oldText match) — Gate 01 mainly guards write tool
Pi-agent memory store is separate from Claude Code memory (different LanceDB at ~/.torus/memory/lancedb/)
next_steps: Port causal chain tools (record_attempt, record_outcome, query_fix_history) — straightforward
Add resources_discover handler for dynamic session context (LIVE_STATE equivalent) — straightforward
Port skills to pi-agent's skill system (/brainstorm, /implement, etc.) — needs quick explore of pi skill docs
Test Gate 17 injection defense with actual injection payloads in pi-agent
Add pi manifest ("pi" field) to torus-pi-agent package.json for cleaner discovery
